source: Amazon Seller Central — FBA Orders (real, via Claude-in-Chrome), Manage Inventory (real), Campaign Manager partial screenshot (real 7-day clicks/sales/impressions; spend/ACoS/orders still pending).
status: REAL — FBA Orders confirm 5 order lines in 7-day window (Apr 14-20). No new orders Apr 19 or Apr 20. 7-day revenue holding at $214.96 (identical to Apr 19). BSR regressed to 103,823 (was 81,677 on Apr 19). Amazon's Choice badge status not re-confirmed today.

highlights.bsr_regression: Fountain BSR worsened from 81,677 → 103,823 (+22,146). Two consecutive zero-sale days (Apr 19 + Apr 20) appear to be dragging rank. Need to re-check Amazon's Choice badge status.
highlights.no_new_orders_48h: No fountain, filter, or bundle orders on Apr 19 or Apr 20. Longest dry spell since the badge activated Apr 17.
highlights.today_apr20: 0 orders as of ~7:50 PM PDT. Sales $0.00 today so far (Seller Central home page confirmed). Ad spend $22.46 today so far with 0 PPC sales.
highlights.revenue_stability: 7-day revenue $214.96 identical to Apr 19 — Dee (Apr 12) rolled off, nothing new came in to replace it in the window shift.
highlights.data_gap: Review count not captured (amazon.com public listing blocked for extension). Campaign Manager 7-day spend/ACoS/orders not captured (only impressions/clicks/sales visible on overview).

business_reports._revenue_calc: Jerry bundle $64.99 + Ruth $49.99 + Jennifer $49.99 + Mallory $49.99 = $214.96. Identical to Apr 19 7-day total.

campaign_manager._acos_30day_note: Real — Campaign Manager Products page (Mar 21-Apr 20 window), Fountain row. ROAS=0.60 shown on page; ACoS = 100/ROAS = 166.67%. WORSENED from 149.06% yesterday (spend up, sales flat).

fountain._velocity_30day_calc: 12 units / 30 days = 0.40/day (per Manage Inventory display). Up from 0.33 yesterday — reflects Mallory Apr 18 entering the 30-day window.
fountain._velocity_7day_calc: 4 fountain units (3 standalone + 1 bundle component) / 7 days = 0.57/day. Same as Apr 19.
